import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";// StatsBar.js — top stats row
export default function StatsBar(_ref){let{stats}=_ref;if(!stats)return null;const fmt=n=>n>=10000000?'₹'+(n/10000000).toFixed(1)+'Cr':n>=100000?'₹'+(n/100000).toFixed(1)+'L':'₹'+(n||0).toLocaleString('en-IN');const items=[{label:'Total Billed',value:fmt(stats.totalRevenue),color:'#fcd34d'},{label:'Collected',value:fmt(stats.totalCollected),color:'#86efac'},{label:'Open Orders',value:stats.openOrders,color:'#7dd3fc'},{label:'Broken Flows',value:stats.brokenFlows,color:stats.brokenFlows>0?'#fca5a5':'#86efac'},{label:'Customers',value:stats.customerCount,color:'#c4b5fd'},{label:'Invoices',value:stats.invoiceCount,color:'#5eead4'}];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{display:'flex',gap:1,borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06)',background:'#0f1117',flexShrink:0},children:items.map(item=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{flex:1,padding:'8px 14px',borderRight:'1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.04)'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontSize:10,color:'#555e74',letterSpacing:'0.04em',textTransform:'uppercase',marginBottom:2},children:item.label}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontSize:15,fontWeight:600,color:item.color,fontVariantNumeric:'tabular-nums'},children:item.value})]},item.label))});}
